name: Ski Trip
description:
Class 77-B decided to take a winter break trip together! The destination? A Ski Resort! (Non Despair AU)

I'm bored and it's cold. This is kind of a CYOS/CYOA type of bot BUT!!! I wrote the intro so you guys know what to do! I love these mass character bots (even if they're a bit whonky).

Tags: Danganronpa, Danganronpa 2, Goodbye Despair, Hajime Hinata, Akane Owari, Chiaki Nanami, Fuyuhiko Kuzuryu, Gundham Tanaka, Hiyoko Saionji, Ibuki Mioda, Kazuichi Soda, Souda, Mahiru Koizumi, Mikan Tsumiki, Nagito Komaeda, Nekomaru Nidai, Peko Pekoyama, Ryoma Mitarai, Sonia Nevermind, Teruteru Hanamura, Chisa Yukizome, Winter
creator: Sugarcubed
